title: MM House
shortDescription: A two-story residence where strict geometric form meets a natural setting. The building's composition consists of two clearly distinct volumes - a dark, monumental upper cube and a lighter, timber-clad ground floor that seemingly dissolves into the landscape. The central idea of the project is a circular portal in the facade, serving as a symbolic threshold between the public and private realms. This motif brings a sense of playfulness and poetry to an otherwise ascetic building.
